name: apple-money-count
title: Apple Money Count
description: Apple-style finance counter that counts from $0 to $10,000, flashes green, and bursts money icons with sound.
author: Stronkter
sourcePrompt: 📷PentoVideo by HeyGen Make me a five-second video of, on a white background, of a Apple-style bold font counting from $0 to $10,000. Once it counts to $10,000, it changes to a green color and the screen also flashes green for a second, and then money icons come out of the $10,000 amount all over the screen and then disappear.
